sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_repl_status (server VARCHAR, account VARCHAR, level INTEGER, stat INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_repl_status (server, account, level, stat) VALUES ('server1', 'account1', 1, 0);
UPDATE test_repl_status SET stat = 1 WHERE server = 'server1' AND account = 'account1';
SELECT repl_status(server, account, level, stat) FROM test_repl_status;
DELETE FROM test_repl_status WHERE server = 'server1' AND account = 'account1';
